brief: Generate a user-settings page layout (SettingsPage.tsx, default export) using ONLY components imported from '@upskill/components'. Structure: a single page containing (1) a 'Profile' area with a Heading, an Avatar, and two TextFields (display name, email); (2) a 'Preferences' area with a Select for interface language whose chosen value is held in React state, and three Checkboxes for email notification options, each held in React state; (3) a 'Danger zone' area with a short explanatory body sentence and an outlined destructive Button. Use proper HTML landmarks throughout. All visible copy must render through the system's typography components; spacing must come from the layout components' token-based props — do not hand-write CSS, inline spacing styles, or media queries.

requiredPatterns.reason: canonical Select change-callback name — required to hold the language in state
